audience: Service businesses, contractors, and local operators that need cash flow planning before tax deadlines.
funding_experience: Refers clients to banks occasionally but wants a clearer funding readiness workflow.
notes: Wants safe language and does not want to make funding promises to clients. Currently refers funding: Sometimes. Referral process: Usually makes warm email introductions and tracks notes in HubSpot. Success goal: A simple client-safe referral path and educational resources that do not overpromise outcomes. Launch timeline: This month. Preferred next step: Send resources. Partner acknowledgment: true. Contact permission: true.
